studies.title: Evaluation of the digital health application MAWENDO
studies.brief_summary: When the (German) Digital Health Care Act comes into force, digital health care applications (DiGA) can be prescribed by doctors under certain conditions and reimbursed by health insurance companies. The rehabilitation DiGA "Mawendo" is aimed at patients with orthopedic diseases, either chronic or acute. "Mawendo" provides individual, preconfigured exercises digitally to the users, so that they can carry out their own home training. To be included in the directory of digital health applications, a study must demonstrate positive effects of this digital application compared to the reality of care (in this case classical physiotherapy).

studies.title: Evaluation II of the digital health application MAWENDO
studies.brief_summary: Since the Digital Healthcare Act came into force, digital health applications (DiGA) can be prescribed by doctors and reimbursed by health insurance companies under certain conditions. The “Mawendo” DiGA is aimed at patients with orthopaedic or accident surgery conditions. “Mawendo” provides users with individual, preconfigured exercises digitally so that they can carry out their own home training. In order to be included in the list of digital health applications, positive care effects must be demonstrated in a study compared to the reality of care (in this case, traditional physiotherapy).
